# @platform/contracts-graphql

GraphQL contract package containing schema-owned operations and generated TypedDocumentNode artifacts.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/contracts-graphql
Version: 0.1.0
Component: contracts-graphql
Type: api
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: core
Bounded context: graphql-contracts
Owner: team-contract
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: contract
Class: active.contract
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-contract
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Own representative GraphQL operations, fragments, and generated operation types
- Publish TypedDocumentNode artifacts for consumers
- Define compatibility expectations between schema and consumers
- Expose generic profile, access-control, and analytics GraphQL operation contracts

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not create Apollo Client or TanStack Query clients
- Does not render React components
- Does not own feature workflow composition

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Generated by GraphQL Code Generator from schema and operations
- Consumed by feature and adapter packages through public exports

```text
feature
adapter
tooling
test
```

### Forbidden consumers

```text
runtime-fetch
client-cache-ownership
```

- Contract package separates GraphQL type ownership from runtime transport ownership
